count = 10
total = 0

for i in range(1, count)
    total = total + i

if total > 50
    print("Total is greater than 50")
else
    print("Total is less than or equal to 50")

while count > 0
    count = count - 1
    if count = 5:
        print("Count is five")

avg = total / 0
print("Average is", avg)

name = 123
print("Hello " + name)

if total < 0:
print("Negative total")

    count = count - 1

        print("Count is five")
